prediction.reasoning: Based on typical daily volatility for PG (Procter & Gamble) as a large-cap consumer staples stock, which historically shows relatively low volatility around 1-2% daily moves. The point estimate assumes slight upward momentum typical of stable dividend stocks. Confidence intervals are constructed using approximately 0.7%, 1.2%, and 1.7% standard deviations for 50%, 80%, and 90% confidence levels respectively, reflecting PG's historically stable price movements.
